reason: Rationale B is more specific and helpful to the shopper, explaining why the piece suits festive occasions and what kind of aesthetic sensibility it appeals to (classic elegance, graceful statement). It goes beyond generic descriptors like 'timeless' to paint a clearer picture of who the piece is for and how it would feel to wear it, helping the shopper visualize the purchase better. Both rationales acknowledge the emerald vs. sapphire mismatch implicitly without overclaiming, but B provides more actionable style context.
